feedback.text: Hello! Could you, please, also add protection against video games being destroyed that have already being sold to customers? I previously, like many others owned a copy of "The Crew" game which was an online experience. The game servers were turned offline and there is no way to play this game otherwise. This is jut an example, but multiple more games are in the same situation. This has been a problem for quite a while now and Game companies keep profiting of the fact that there are no regulations on this. Thank you!
